en: cheerful, energetic, and full of enthusiasm
ex_en: Her ebullient personality lifted the mood of the entire research team.
ex_ko: 그녀의 활기 넘치는 성격은 연구팀 전체의 분위기를 북돋웠다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg1" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft1" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg1)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft1)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft1)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🎉</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">ebullient</text></svg>

ex_en: The eccentric inventor tested his machines only after midnight.
ex_ko: 그 별난 발명가는 자정이 지난 뒤에만 자신의 기계들을 시험했다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg2" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft2" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg2)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft2)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft2)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🎩</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">eccentric</text></svg>

en: selected from a wide range of sources or styles
ex_en: The museum's eclectic collection ranges from ancient pottery to digital art.
ex_ko: 그 박물관의 다채로운 소장품은 고대 도자기부터 디지털 예술까지 아우른다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg3" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft3" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg3)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft3)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft3)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🎨</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">eclectic</text></svg>

en: to instruct or improve someone morally or intellectually
ex_en: The documentary seeks to edify viewers without oversimplifying the issue.
ex_ko: 그 다큐멘터리는 쟁점을 지나치게 단순화하지 않으면서 시청자를 교육하려 한다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg4" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft4" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg4)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft4)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft4)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">📚</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">edify</text></svg>

en: to erase, remove, or make less noticeable
ex_en: Time had effaced most of the inscription on the stone monument.
ex_ko: 세월이 돌기념비의 비문 대부분을 지워 버렸다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg5" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft5" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg5)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft5)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft5)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🧽</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">efface</text></svg>

en: an unrestrained outpouring of emotion, words, or liquid
ex_en: The scientist responded to the award with an effusion of gratitude.
ex_ko: 그 과학자는 수상에 대해 감사의 감정을 한껏 쏟아냈다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg6" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft6" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg6)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft6)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft6)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">💐</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">effusion</text></svg>

en: favoring social, political, or economic equality
ex_en: The organization adopted an egalitarian structure in which every member had one vote.
ex_ko: 그 조직은 모든 구성원이 한 표씩 갖는 평등주의적 구조를 채택했다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg7" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft7" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg7)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft7)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft7)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">⚖️</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">egalitarian</text></svg>

en: self-centered and unable to consider other perspectives
ex_en: His egocentric argument ignored how the policy would affect low-income families.
ex_ko: 그의 자기중심적인 주장은 그 정책이 저소득 가정에 미칠 영향을 무시했다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg8" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft8" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg8)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft8)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft8)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🪞</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">egocentric</text></svg>

ex_en: The audit uncovered an egregious misuse of public funds.
ex_ko: 감사 결과 공공 자금의 터무니없이 심각한 오용이 드러났다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg9" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft9" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg9)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft9)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft9)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🚨</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">egregious</text></svg>

en: to draw out a response, fact, or reaction
ex_en: The interviewer used an open-ended question to elicit a detailed response.
ex_ko: 면접관은 자세한 답변을 이끌어 내기 위해 개방형 질문을 사용했다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg10" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft10" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg10)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft10)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft10)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🎤</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">elicit</text></svg>

ex_en: Her elliptical reply suggested disagreement without stating it directly.
ex_ko: 그녀의 생략적이고 간접적인 답변은 직접 말하지 않고도 반대 의사를 드러냈다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg11" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft11" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg11)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft11)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft11)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🥚</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">elliptical</text></svg>

en: difficult to find, catch, understand, or define
ex_en: A simple explanation for the unexpected result remained elusive.
ex_ko: 예상 밖의 결과에 대한 간단한 설명은 좀처럼 찾아지지 않았다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg12" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft12" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg12)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft12)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft12)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🦋</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">elusive</text></svg>

en: to leave one's country to live permanently in another
ex_en: Political instability prompted many families to emigrate.
ex_ko: 정치적 불안정 때문에 많은 가정이 해외로 이주했다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg13" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft13" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg13)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft13)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft13)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">✈️</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">emigrate</text></svg>

en: famous, respected, and distinguished in a field
ex_en: An eminent biologist delivered the opening lecture at the conference.
ex_ko: 한 저명한 생물학자가 학회의 개막 강연을 했다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg14" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft14" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg14)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft14)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft14)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🏅</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">eminent</text></svg>

en: based on observation, experiment, or measurable evidence
ex_en: The claim is persuasive only if it is supported by empirical evidence.
ex_ko: 그 주장은 실증적 증거로 뒷받침될 때에만 설득력이 있다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg15" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft15" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg15)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft15)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft15)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🔬</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">empirical</text></svg>

en: to try to equal or surpass someone by imitation
ex_en: Young researchers often emulate the methods of scholars they admire.
ex_ko: 젊은 연구자들은 흔히 자신이 존경하는 학자들의 방법을 본받는다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg16" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft16" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg16)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft16)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft16)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🏃</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">emulate</text></svg>

en: to intrude gradually on another's territory, rights, or time
ex_en: Commercial development began to encroach on the protected wetland.
ex_ko: 상업 개발이 보호 습지를 서서히 침범하기 시작했다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg17" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft17" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg17)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft17)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft17)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🌊</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">encroach</text></svg>

en: native to or regularly found in a particular place
ex_en: The frog is endemic to a small chain of tropical islands.
ex_ko: 그 개구리는 열대의 작은 군도에만 고유하게 서식한다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg18" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft18" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg18)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft18)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft18)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🐸</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">endemic</text></svg>

en: to weaken or drain energy from
ex_en: Weeks of extreme heat enervated both the workers and the livestock.
ex_ko: 몇 주간 이어진 극심한 더위가 노동자들과 가축 모두를 기진맥진하게 했다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg19" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft19" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg19)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft19)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft19)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🔋</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">enervate</text></svg>

en: to give voting rights or full political privileges
ex_en: The reform sought to enfranchise citizens who had long been excluded from elections.
ex_ko: 그 개혁은 오랫동안 선거에서 배제된 시민들에게 투표권을 주려 했다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg20" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft20" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg20)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft20)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft20)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🗳️</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">enfranchise</text></svg>

en: to cause or give rise to a feeling or condition
ex_en: Transparent decision-making can engender trust among employees.
ex_ko: 투명한 의사 결정은 직원들 사이에 신뢰를 형성할 수 있다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg21" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft21" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg21)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft21)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft21)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🌱</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">engender</text></svg>

en: a mysterious or difficult-to-understand person or thing
ex_en: The sudden disappearance of the manuscript remains an enigma.
ex_ko: 그 원고가 갑자기 사라진 사건은 여전히 수수께끼로 남아 있다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg22" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft22" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg22)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft22)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft22)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🧩</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">enigma</text></svg>

en: the extreme seriousness or wickedness of an act; immense scale
ex_en: Only later did officials grasp the enormity of the environmental damage.
ex_ko: 관리들은 나중에야 환경 피해의 엄청난 심각성을 깨달았다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg23" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft23" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg23)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft23)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft23)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🌋</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">enormity</text></svg>

en: lasting for only a very short time
ex_en: Online fame can be ephemeral, disappearing as quickly as it arises.
ex_ko: 온라인상의 명성은 생겨난 만큼이나 빠르게 사라지는 덧없는 것일 수 있다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg25" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft25" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg25)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft25)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft25)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🌸</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">ephemeral</text></svg>

en: a short, witty, and memorable saying or poem
ex_en: The essay begins with an epigram that captures its central argument.
ex_ko: 그 에세이는 핵심 주장을 압축한 경구로 시작한다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg24" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft24" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg24)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft24)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft24)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">✒️</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">epigram</text></svg>

en: a quotation placed at the beginning of a book or chapter
ex_en: The novel's epigraph foreshadows the conflict that follows.
ex_ko: 그 소설의 제사는 뒤이어 벌어질 갈등을 암시한다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg27" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft27" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg27)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft27)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft27)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">📖</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">epigraph</text></svg>

en: words written in memory of a deceased person, often on a tomb
ex_en: The poet chose a simple line from her work as her epitaph.
ex_ko: 그 시인은 자신의 묘비명으로 작품 속 한 구절을 골랐다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg26" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft26" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg26)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft26)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft26)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🪦</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">epitaph</text></svg>

en: a perfect example of a particular quality or type
ex_en: Her calm response under pressure was the epitome of professionalism.
ex_ko: 압박 속에서도 침착했던 그녀의 대응은 전문성의 전형이었다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg28" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft28" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg28)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft28)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft28)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">💎</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">epitome</text></svg>

en: mental calmness and composure, especially under stress
ex_en: He accepted both praise and criticism with remarkable equanimity.
ex_ko: 그는 칭찬과 비판을 모두 놀라울 만큼 침착하게 받아들였다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg29" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft29" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg29)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft29)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft29)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🧘</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">equanimity</text></svg>

en: fair and impartial, taking different needs into account
ex_en: The committee proposed an equitable distribution of limited resources.
ex_ko: 위원회는 제한된 자원을 공정하게 배분하는 방안을 제안했다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg30" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft30" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg30)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft30)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft30)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🤝</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">equitable</text></svg>

en: ambiguous or deliberately avoiding a clear commitment
ex_en: The minister's equivocal statement satisfied neither side of the debate.
ex_ko: 장관의 애매한 성명은 논쟁의 어느 쪽도 만족시키지 못했다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg31" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft31" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg31)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft31)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft31)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">❓</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">equivocal</text></svg>

en: having or showing extensive scholarly knowledge
ex_en: The professor's erudite lecture connected philosophy, mathematics, and history.
ex_ko: 그 교수의 박식한 강의는 철학, 수학, 역사를 서로 연결했다.
svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 720 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><defs><linearGradient id="bg32" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1"><stop offset="0%" stop-color="#eaf4ff"/><stop offset="55%" stop-color="#f5efff"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#fff7e8"/></linearGradient><filter id="soft32" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%"><feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="18"/></filter></defs><rect width="720" height="360" rx="32" fill="url(#bg32)"/><circle cx="100" cy="75" r="55" fill="#bfdbfe" opacity=".58" filter="url(#soft32)"/><circle cx="610" cy="275" r="78" fill="#ddd6fe" opacity=".65" filter="url(#soft32)"/><path d="M45 292 C170 205 274 370 675 132" fill="none" stroke="#a5b4fc" stroke-width="11" stroke-linecap="round" opacity=".44"/><circle cx="360" cy="142" r="82" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".72"/><text x="360" y="174" text-anchor="middle" font-size="102">🧠</text><rect x="128" y="246" width="464" height="72" rx="36" fill="#ffffff" opacity=".9"/><text x="360" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-size="34" font-weight="800" fill="#172033">erudite</text></svg>

ex_en: The professor's esoteric lecture on ancient runes confused most of the students.
ex_ko: 고대 룬 문자에 관한 그 교수의 난해한 강의는 대부분의 학생을 혼란스럽게 했다.

ex_en: An ethereal mist drifted over the silent lake at dawn.
ex_ko: 새벽녘 고요한 호수 위로 천상의 안개가 떠다녔다.

en: quickly fading from sight or memory
ex_en: The evanescent glow of the fireflies vanished within seconds.
ex_ko: 반딧불의 덧없는 빛은 몇 초 만에 사라졌다.

ex_en: Her exacting teacher demanded a flawless performance from every student.
ex_ko: 그녀의 까다로운 선생님은 모든 학생에게 완벽한 연주를 요구했다.

ex_en: The detective conducted an exhaustive search of the entire building.
ex_ko: 그 형사는 건물 전체를 빠짐없이 철저히 수색했다.

ex_en: Losing his job triggered an existential crisis about his purpose in life.
ex_ko: 직장을 잃자 그는 삶의 목적에 대한 실존적 위기를 겪었다.

ex_en: Cutting corners was an expedient but dishonest way to finish on time.
ex_ko: 대충 처리하는 것은 제때 끝내기 위한 편의적이지만 정직하지 못한 방법이었다.

ex_en: The instructions were explicit, leaving no room for misunderstanding.
ex_ko: 그 지시는 명백해서 오해의 여지가 전혀 없었다.

ex_en: Please remove any extraneous details that distract from the main argument.
ex_ko: 핵심 논지를 흐리는 불필요한 세부 사항은 모두 빼 주세요.

ex_en: His facetious remarks during the funeral upset the grieving family.
ex_ko: 장례식 중 그의 경박한 농담은 슬퍼하는 유족을 화나게 했다.

ex_en: The critic dismissed the novel for its facile, oversimplified plot.
ex_ko: 비평가는 그 소설의 안이하고 지나치게 단순한 줄거리를 비판했다.

ex_en: The trial became farcical when the lawyer forgot his own client's name.
ex_ko: 변호사가 자기 의뢰인의 이름을 잊자 재판은 우스꽝스러워졌다.

en: very attentive to detail or cleanliness
ex_en: A fastidious chef, she inspected every plate before it left the kitchen.
ex_ko: 까다로운 요리사인 그녀는 접시가 주방을 나가기 전 하나하나 점검했다.

ex_en: His fatuous grin showed he had no idea how serious the situation was.
ex_ko: 그의 얼빠진 미소는 상황이 얼마나 심각한지 전혀 모른다는 것을 드러냈다.

ex_en: The fecund soil of the valley produced three harvests a year.
ex_ko: 그 계곡의 비옥한 토양은 1년에 세 번의 수확을 냈다.

ex_en: When she said she was 'dying of laughter,' she meant it in a figurative sense.
ex_ko: 그녀가 '웃겨 죽겠다'고 했을 때 그것은 비유적인 의미였다.

ex_en: The referee called a flagrant foul after the violent tackle.
ex_ko: 심판은 그 난폭한 태클 후 노골적인 반칙을 선언했다.

ex_en: Their fortuitous meeting at the airport led to a lifelong friendship.
ex_ko: 공항에서의 우연한 만남이 평생의 우정으로 이어졌다.

ex_en: The two clubs shared a fraternal bond built over many years.
ex_ko: 두 동아리는 오랜 세월에 걸쳐 쌓인 형제 같은 유대를 나눴다.

ex_en: The trading floor was a scene of frenetic activity before the bell.
ex_ko: 거래소 객장은 종이 울리기 전 정신없이 바쁜 모습이었다.

ex_en: Living a frugal life, he saved most of his salary each month.
ex_ko: 검소한 생활을 하며 그는 매달 월급의 대부분을 저축했다.

en: secretive because of guilt or fear
ex_en: She cast a furtive glance at the exam paper beside her.
ex_ko: 그녀는 옆 사람의 시험지를 은밀히 흘끗 쳐다봤다.

en: unable to produce any useful result
ex_en: All their efforts to restart the engine proved futile.
ex_ko: 엔진을 다시 켜려는 그들의 모든 노력은 헛수고로 드러났다.

ex_en: Our garrulous neighbor can talk for hours about nothing.
ex_ko: 우리 수다스러운 이웃은 별것 아닌 일로 몇 시간이고 떠들 수 있다.

ex_en: Her genteel manners revealed an upbringing of careful etiquette.
ex_ko: 그녀의 점잖은 매너는 세심한 예절 교육을 받은 성장 배경을 드러냈다.

ex_en: The politician's grandiloquent speech impressed almost no one.
ex_ko: 그 정치인의 과장된 연설은 거의 아무에게도 감명을 주지 못했다.

ex_en: His grandiose plan to build a city in the desert never materialized.
ex_ko: 사막에 도시를 세우겠다는 그의 거창한 계획은 결코 실현되지 않았다.

ex_en: The film was criticized for its gratuitous violence.
ex_ko: 그 영화는 불필요한 폭력성으로 비판받았다.

ex_en: Being gregarious, she made friends wherever she traveled.
ex_ko: 사교적인 그녀는 어디를 여행하든 친구를 사귀었다.

ex_en: The movie relied on hackneyed clichés we have all seen before.
ex_ko: 그 영화는 우리가 다 본 진부한 상투적 표현에 의존했다.

ex_en: The hapless traveler missed his train and lost his luggage.
ex_ko: 그 운 없는 여행자는 기차를 놓치고 짐까지 잃어버렸다.

ex_en: The samples were stored in a hermetic container to keep out air.
ex_ko: 표본들은 공기를 차단하기 위해 밀폐 용기에 보관되었다.

ex_en: Her histrionic reaction to the small mistake startled everyone.
ex_ko: 사소한 실수에 대한 그녀의 과장된 반응은 모두를 놀라게 했다.

ex_en: The committee was criticized for being too homogeneous in background.
ex_ko: 그 위원회는 배경이 너무 동질적이라는 비판을 받았다.

ex_en: Let's consider a hypothetical situation where prices double overnight.
ex_ko: 가격이 하룻밤 사이 두 배가 되는 가상의 상황을 생각해 보자.

ex_en: They spent an idyllic summer in a cottage by the sea.
ex_ko: 그들은 바닷가 오두막에서 목가적인 여름을 보냈다.

ex_en: The agents uncovered an illicit trade in protected animals.
ex_ko: 요원들은 보호 동물의 불법 거래를 적발했다.

ex_en: Dark clouds warned that a storm was imminent.
ex_ko: 먹구름은 폭풍이 임박했음을 알렸다.

ex_en: The laws of physics are immutable and apply everywhere.
ex_ko: 물리 법칙은 불변이며 어디서나 적용된다.

ex_en: A judge must remain impartial and ignore personal feelings.
ex_ko: 판사는 공정함을 유지하고 개인적 감정을 배제해야 한다.

ex_en: His impeccable manners made a strong impression at the interview.
ex_ko: 그의 흠잡을 데 없는 매너는 면접에서 강한 인상을 남겼다.

ex_en: The museum displayed robes from the imperial court.
ex_ko: 그 박물관은 황실 궁정의 의복을 전시했다.

ex_en: The new coating is impervious to water and rust.
ex_ko: 새 코팅은 물과 녹에 영향을 받지 않는다.

ex_en: His impetuous decision to quit surprised his whole family.
ex_ko: 직장을 그만두겠다는 그의 충동적인 결정은 온 가족을 놀라게 했다.

ex_en: Without funding, the committee was impotent to make any real change.
ex_ko: 자금이 없어 그 위원회는 실질적인 변화를 만들 힘이 없었다.

ex_en: The talk show was full of inane chatter with no real substance.
ex_ko: 그 토크쇼는 알맹이 없는 무의미한 잡담으로 가득했다.

ex_en: The incandescent bulb filled the room with a warm glow.
ex_ko: 백열전구가 방을 따뜻한 빛으로 채웠다.
